sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a Windows program executable started from a suspicious folder

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a suspicious svchost process start
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect suspicious parent processes of well-known Windows processes

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the creation of an executable by another executable

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows, PECompact2 compressed

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET POLICY DNS Query to DynDNS Domain *.zapto .org
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET POLICY DNS Query to DynDNS Domain *.zapto .org"; dns.query; content:".zapto.org"; nocase; endswith; reference:url,www.noip.com/support/faq/free-dynamic-dns-domains; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2028703; rev:1; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_10_14, deployment Perimeter, performance_impact Low, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2019_10_14;)
